notes: Default local adapter runs scripts/local_phase.ps1 for proposal/design scaffolding and export-contract checks.
Local adapter does not write creative manuscript, polish, or rewrite output.
Creative writing requires either manual IDE agent work or explicit provider/API/CLI phase commands.
Do not claim internet research occurred unless a dedicated research phase/tool produced source artifacts.
Template placeholders: {phase}, {project_root}, {run_id}, {from_phase}, {to_phase}, {phase_prompt}
Alternative: fill phase_commands.<phase> for explicit per-phase commands.
Dictionary check is optional and only runs for create/polish/rewrite when enabled.
When dictionary check is enabled, require_dictionary_provider=true makes missing Python/tdk-py fail instead of silently skipping.
Phase evidence is mandatory when require_phase_evidence=true.
execution_claim_mode should be 'executed' only when actual command-mode execution is used.
design-big/design-small/create/rewrite/export require explicit approval JSON files when require_user_approvals=true.
design-big must produce book-plan, chapter-plan, and layout-plan artifacts; design-small is blocked until book-plan-approval.json is approved by the user.
phase contracts are hard gates when enforce_phase_contracts=true.
Agent orchestration is governed by runtime/agent-registry.json, runtime/agent-status-contract.json, and runtime/phase-contracts/*.json.
Agent compliance manifests must include concrete output_artifacts plus matching artifact_hashes.
Agent compliance manifests must include contract_hashes for the current agent registry, status contract, and phase contract.
Agent compliance manifests must include agent_statuses; required agents must be completed.
Configured phase commands pass a fail-closed safety gate before execution.
Large text/JSON/Markdown artifacts are rejected unless split into bounded evidence.
The runner writes runtime/runs/{run_id}/run-journal.jsonl for phase.started, phase.completed, and phase.failed events.
Exported DOCX text must match the current episode source files.
negative enforcement blocks forbidden content patterns in episode outputs.
text quality gates block weak episodes (length, repetition, dialogue style, psychological markers, encoding).
professional writing gates require writing-type, structure-template, editorial scorecard, and LLM adapter contract state files.
official publication gates require TDK rule references and publication compliance artifacts before print-ready claims.
Critical phases require execution_claim_mode=executed by default.
retention.max_runs controls how many run directories are kept under runtime/runs/.
